Payroll, Time & Benefits
Track hours and manage multi-rate pay, simplify time off requests, streamline benefits enrollment, and run payroll all from a single platform. No more data double entry or manual approval processes—just easy, accurate payroll for you and your employees.

Find, hire, and onboard the best talent quickly. With the powerful BambooHR applicant tracking system and proactive onboarding tasks, you can create a compelling candidate experience and better first days for new hires.

Enjoy your one-stop shop for data management, with instant, pre-built reports, automated workflows, an AI-powered HR assistant, and in-depth analytics to get the answers you need, fast.

Get a Demo
Start Free Trial
Frequently Asked Questions
What does BambooHR do?
BambooHR is the complete HR platform that brings all your employee, payroll, time, and benefit information together in one place, giving you the data accuracy, security, and coordination you need to sleep soundly.
Does BambooHR do payroll?
Yes. BambooHR has its own add-on payroll solution that allows data to flow automatically, reducing the risk of double entry and making payroll runs quick and easy. In addition to seamless data flow, payroll customers also enjoy comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support, and full-service tax filing. Learn more by visiting the
product page
on the BambooHR website.
How much does BambooHR cost?
BambooHR pricing varies depending on the number of employees at your organization and the features you select. To get a free price quote, call 1-866-387-9595 or visit our
pricing page.
How many countries is BambooHR in?
BambooHR serves customers in over 150+ countries.
Is your support team outsourced?
No, our support team is entirely in-house to ensure you receive the best service possible.
Is BambooHR a PEO?
BambooHR is an HR software solution, not an outsourcing provider. While we don't provide HR staff for you, we do offer top-notch tools that help time-strapped HR professionals perform the work of many. Even a one-person HR department can use BambooHR to analyze people data, hire talent, onboard new employees, manage compensation, and help strengthen their company culture. And that's just the beginning.
Where's my data housed? How secure is BambooHR?
BambooHR customer data is hosted in the United States, Canada, or Ireland, depending on the location and needs of individual customers and applicable laws. All information is encrypted in transit, and sensitive fields are encrypted at rest. In addition, the data center located in Ireland meets all of the data requirements of the European Union, European Economic Area, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
We use a Zero Trust model to keep your data locked down at every level, and we take multiple measures to ensure it stays that way. Here are just some of the measures we take to prevent data leaks and unauthorized data access:
Defense in Depth multi-level data security
Annual third-party SOC II security audit
Frequent vulnerability scans
SAML Support
Web application firewall
Annual penetration test
In a rush? Try BambooHR now!
Start Free Trial

Newest
Newest
Title
Company Contribution Carryover for Age-Banded Medical Plans
Date of release: 06/30/2026
Save time setting up age-banded medical buy-up plans by automatically carrying over company contributions from a base plan. Employee costs stay accurate without manual calculations, even when base plan contributions change.
Add-on | Benefits Administration
Read Full Release Note
Contractor Management
Date of release: 06/29/2026
Contractor Management, powered by Remote, brings contract creation, compliance, and payments for global contractors into BambooHR for full global workforce management.
Add-on | Contractor Management
Read Full Release Note
Remote and BambooHR Nightly Time Off Sync
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Keep EOR employee time off records aligned automatically. A new nightly sync helps ensure Remote and BambooHR stay in sync by correcting missed or outdated time off data behind the scenes.
Add-on | Hiring
Read Full Release Note
Time & Attendance Schedules on Mobile & Time Kiosk
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Employees can now see upcoming shifts directly from the BambooHR mobile app and BambooHR Time Kiosk. With a new Schedule view and a smarter My Time widget, it's easier to stay informed, clock in on time, and plan the workweek ahead.
Add-on | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
Clear Terminated Employee Data
Date of release: 06/25/2026
Bulk remove supported field data from terminated employee records while protecting required fields.
Core, Pro, Elite | HR Data and Reporting
Read Full Release Note
Printing Shift Schedules
Date of release: 06/22/2026
Create clean, shareable schedule PDFs in just a few clicks. Schedule Printing gives managers and administrators an easy way to filter, print, and distribute schedules while keeping important shift information clear and organized.
Add-on | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
New York Metropolitan Commuter Transportation Mobility Tax Calculation Changes
Date of release: 06/17/2026
BambooHR now automatically calculates New York MCTMT using real-time quarter-to-date payroll totals, including threshold monitoring, catch-up calculations, and zone-based wage tracking.
Add-on | Payroll
Read Full Release Note
Bulk Actions for Project Tracking
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Admins can now archive, unarchive, and delete multiple Project Tracking projects at once in Time & Attendance to save time and reduce repetitive work.
Core, Pro, Elite | Time & Attendance
Read Full Release Note
First Three Background Checks for Free
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Try BambooHR Background Checks with even more flexibility. You can now run your first three background checks for free, making it easier to evaluate candidates and experience the value of background screening.
Core, Pro, Elite | Hiring
Read Full Release Note
Recognition & Rewards in BambooHR,
Date of release: 06/04/2026
Recognition & Rewards helps employees celebrate great work, reinforce company values, award points, and redeem rewards through an integrated recognition experience in BambooHR.
Pro and Elite | Recognition and Rewards
Read Full Release Note
Load More

analysis.name: BambooHR
analysis.value_proposition: Complete HR platform combining people, payroll, and benefits data in one system for SMB and mid-market employers.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to mid-sized businesses (25-500 employees) needing consolidated HRIS, payroll, benefits, and hiring in one platform

features.name: employee records
features.description: Centralized HR database for sensitive people data
features.evidence_quote: Manage all of your sensitive people data in one organized and secure HR database.

features.name: custom report builder
features.description: Build custom reports with real-time previews
features.evidence_quote: Build custom reports in seconds using data from across BambooHR, with real-time previews

features.name: workflows and approvals
features.description: Built-in workflows for info updates and time-off
features.evidence_quote: Use built-in workflows to streamline employee information updates and time-off requests.

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Visualize key HR metrics for data-driven decisions
features.evidence_quote: Visualize key HR metrics, enabling efficient analysis and data-driven decisions.

features.name: custom dashboards
features.description: New advanced insights and HR benchmarks dashboards
features.evidence_quote: Our new Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks give you the trends and context

features.name: hr benchmarks
features.description: Trend and context data for strategic people decisions
features.evidence_quote: Custom Dashboards and HR Benchmarks give you the trends and context to drive more strategic people decisions

features.name: applicant tracking system
features.description: ATS for finding, hiring, and evaluating candidates
features.evidence_quote: powerful BambooHR applicant tracking system and proactive onboarding tasks

features.name: candidate records
features.description: View contact, resumes, cover letters, ratings
features.evidence_quote: View contact information, resumes, cover letters, answers to custom application questions

features.name: job posting
features.description: Post jobs to leading boards and social networks
features.evidence_quote: Easily reach more qualified candidates. Post jobs to leading boards and your social networks.

features.name: email and offer letter templates
features.description: Customizable templates that auto-populate candidate info
features.evidence_quote: Create customizable email templates that auto-populate with candidate info

features.name: onboarding
features.description: Proactive onboarding tasks for new hires
features.evidence_quote: proactive onboarding tasks, you can create a compelling candidate experience and better first days

features.name: time-off management
features.description: Simplify time-off requests, accruals, approvals
features.evidence_quote: Simplify time-off requests, accruals, approvals, and overall management.

features.name: time-off calendar
features.description: Team-wide visibility into time off
features.evidence_quote: Time-Off Calendar

features.name: benefits administration
features.description: Streamlined benefits enrollment
features.evidence_quote: streamline benefits enrollment, and run payroll all from a single platform

features.name: payroll
features.description: Add-on payroll with automatic data flow and tax filing
features.evidence_quote: BambooHR has its own add-on payroll solution that allows data to flow automatically

features.name: tax filing
features.description: Full-service payroll tax filing
features.evidence_quote: comprehensive payroll reporting, superior customer support, and full-service tax filing

features.name: time and attendance
features.description: Track hours and manage multi-rate pay
features.evidence_quote: Track hours and manage multi-rate pay, simplify time off requests

features.name: multi-rate pay
features.description: Manage employees with multiple pay rates
features.evidence_quote: manage multi-rate pay

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Employee hour tracking
features.evidence_quote: Time Tracking (31)

features.name: scheduling

features.evidence_quote: Employees can now see upcoming shifts directly from the BambooHR mobile app

features.name: time kiosk
features.description: Kiosk device for clocking in/out
features.evidence_quote: BambooHR Time Kiosk

features.name: project tracking
features.description: Track time against projects with bulk admin actions
features.evidence_quote: Bulk Actions for Project Tracking

features.name: performance management

features.evidence_quote: Get the tools you need to gather feedback, strengthen employee satisfaction, and grow your people.

features.name: employee experience
features.description: Feedback tools for engagement
features.evidence_quote: Employee Experience & Performance

features.evidence_quote: Create salary bands, streamline approvals, communicate total rewards, and ensure fair pay

features.evidence_quote: Create salary bands, streamline approvals

features.name: benchmarking data

features.evidence_quote: access to trusted benchmarking data and advanced planning tools

features.name: total rewards statements
features.description: Communicate total rewards to employees
features.evidence_quote: communicate total rewards

features.description: Employer of record and global workforce
features.evidence_quote: Global Employment

features.evidence_quote: Keep EOR employee time off records aligned automatically

differentiators: #1 HR software for small and medium businesses
Powerfully Easy positioning — ease of use as core value

recent_ships.what: Company Contribution Carryover for Age-Banded Medical Plans
recent_ships.source: Save time setting up age-banded medical buy-up plans by automatically carrying over company contributions
Contractor Management brings contract creation, compliance, and payments for global contractors

recent_ships.what: Remote and BambooHR Nightly Time Off Sync
recent_ships.source: A new nightly sync helps ensure Remote and BambooHR stay in sync

recent_ships.what: Time & Attendance Schedules on Mobile & Time Kiosk
recent_ships.source: Employees can now see upcoming shifts directly from the BambooHR mobile app
Bulk remove supported field data from terminated employee records
Create clean, shareable schedule PDFs in just a few clicks.
BambooHR now automatically calculates New York MCTMT using real-time quarter-to-date payroll totals
Admins can now archive, unarchive, and delete multiple Project Tracking projects at once
You can now run your first three background checks for free
Recognition & Rewards helps employees celebrate great work, reinforce company values, award points

praised: Core HR functions are now centralized and accessible reducing the administrative burden.
Out of all the HRIS systems, BambooHR is the easiest to connect with—it's simple, user-friendly, and a breeze to troubleshoot.
BambooHR has given me more time to do the more important things!
Streamlines our processes and makes our HR operations more efficient and cohesive.

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Foundational HR automation and insights — HRIS, ATS, time-off, dashboards

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced features including performance management and deeper reporting

tiers.name: Elite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Top tier with full feature set for larger orgs

pricing.notes: Per-employee-per-month pricing with automatic volume discounts. Only Core price ($10/employee/month) is publicly visible; Pro and Elite require a quote. Free trial available. Payroll, Benefits Admin, Time Tracking, Contractor Management, Recognition & Rewards, and EOR are add-ons priced separately.
